subject: [PATCH v3 5/7] fuse: clean up device cloning

reviews.author: Joanne Koong
reviews.summary: Identified a potential issue where a file descriptor's reference count is not properly released due to an fdget() call holding a refcount on the file.

2026-03-17.patch_summary: Device cloning cleanup patch, specifically addressing an issue where a file descriptor's reference count is not properly released.
